settings.heading: Meat, Your Way, Every Month.
settings.text:
Free Delivery + Free Ribeye Steak with
every delivery of your subscription order.

settings.heading: Get 1 steaks of 250gm each grass-fed New Zealand Beef Ribeye in every order for free!
Have special requests or need meat customizations? Mention them in the cart notes!

settings.testimonial:
Superb meat quality

"I received the perfectly packed meat box with dry ice inside to keep the meat chilled. Super fast delivery & MLS meat quality is really outstanding!."
settings.author: Aprillie G.

settings.testimonial:
Enjoyable Experience

"I ordered Mishkak & Burger Box and received my meat box at a very good price and the meat was amazing. Thanks for the enjoyable experience!"
settings.author: Alya A.

settings.testimonial:
Good quality

"It was an amazing experience to order meat online from MLS and receive the meat box at my doorstep. The meat quality was really good!"
settings.author: Sumaya A.

settings.testimonial:
Great meat up!

"The quality of the meat and the delivery boxes are great! They respond quickly and fast delivered my meat box during the sale season. Thanks!"
settings.author: Sohaib A.

settings.testimonial: "They delivered the wrong specs, but they were kind enough to replace it the next day. You can't receive a faulty meat box from MLS. Happy to have such quality in Oman."
settings.author: Abdullah A.

settings.heading: MLS is loved by over 50,000 customers

settings.text: Experience the magic of simple and perfectly timed deliveries
